name: Photolyase-containing DNA repair cream
summary: Photolyase-containing DNA repair cream is normalized for human UV DNA-damage biomarker evidence in skin.
mechanism_summary: Uses topical photolyase-containing enzyme preparations to reduce UV-induced cyclobutane pyrimidine dimers and related skin DNA-damage markers.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Photolyase-containing cream human UV DNA-damage study; Photolyase-containing cream lowered UV-induced CPDs and apoptosis in human skin.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
